# catnip

> catnip is a free browser game where you adopt, pet, and raise a virtual cat.
> Cats are rendered entirely in code — ~25,000 fur strands in one WebGL draw call —
> with spring-field physics that makes the fur ripple under your cursor.
> Pet your cat until it purrs, play minigames (laser pointer) to earn jelly 🐾,
> feed it to grow your bond, and collect breeds. No install, no login, free.

- [Home / adopt a cat](https://catnip.fun/)
- [Laser pointer minigame](https://catnip.fun/play/laser)
- [Source code](https://github.com/SihyunAdventure/catnip)
